summary: Tested Company Docs Admin feature - All 11 backend tests PASSED, all frontend features verified. Documents grouped by 5 categories, category filters work, search works, slide-by-slide viewer with navigation, tip/warning boxes render correctly, bold markdown works, Done button returns to hub.

backend_get_all_docs.details: Returns all 8 seeded documents with titles, summaries, categories, versions

backend_categories.details: Returns 5 categories: Cyber Security, Company Policy, Legal, Training, Integrations

backend_single_doc.details: Returns full document with slides array

frontend_docs_hub_page.details: Displays all 8 documents grouped by category (CYBER SECURITY, COMPANY POLICY, LEGAL, TRAINING, INTEGRATIONS)

frontend_category_filter_chips.details: All, Cyber Security, Company Policy, Legal, Training, Integrations chips work - clicking filters documents

frontend_search_input.details: Search bar filters documents in real-time

frontend_doc_viewer.details: Slide-by-slide viewer opens when clicking a document

frontend_slide_navigation.details: Previous/Next buttons navigate between slides correctly

frontend_progress_bar.details: Animated progress bar at top updates with slide navigation

frontend_slide_dots.details: Clickable dots for direct slide navigation, active dot highlighted

frontend_tip_boxes.details: Yellow tip boxes with lightbulb icon render correctly (e.g., 'Security is everyone's responsibility')

frontend_warning_boxes.details: Red warning boxes with warning icon render correctly (e.g., 'Never share Confidential data...')

frontend_bold_markdown.details: Bold **text** renders with bold styling (e.g., 'Step 1: Identify', 'Confidential', etc.)

frontend_done_button.details: Done button appears on last slide, clicking returns to docs hub

frontend_company_docs_tile.details: Company Docs tile appears in More > Administration section with correct icon and subtitle

seed_data_creation: Documents seeded via POST /api/docs/seed - 8 documents in company_docs collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company Docs feature is fully working. Backend router at /app/backend/routers/docs.py provides 4 endpoints (list, categories, single doc, seed). Frontend has 2 pages: hub at /admin/docs (index.tsx) and viewer at /admin/docs/[id].tsx. All 8 documents are seeded with slides containing markdown, tips, and warnings.
